message: What is your lowest acceptable price?
My cost is 49. I need at least 55 to profit. What is the highest price you would accept?
I will ask 55 this round. If you raise your bid to 58 next round, we can both enjoy a larger profit.
I will bid 55 if you ask 55.
I cannot bid 58. I will continue to bid 55. Let's keep trading at 55.
I will ask 58 this round. Please bid 58 or higher to secure the trade.
Rounds 1-3 gave us consistent trades at 55. I'm raising my ask to 57 this round. Please bid 57 or higher to maintain our successful trading relationship.
I will bid 55. If you ask higher, we lose a trade. Let's keep trading at 55.
I will ask 55 this round. Please bid 55 to secure the trade and keep our profits stable.
I will bid 55 again. Please ask 55 so we can trade and both benefit.
I will bid 55 again. Please ask 55 to keep our successful trading going.
Let's try 56 this round. You'll still profit, and I'll get a bit more. If you agree, bid 56 so we both benefit.
I will bid 55 again. Please ask 55 to keep our profitable trades going.
I will ask 55 this round. Please bid 55 to secure the trade and maintain our profits.
I will ask 75 this round. Please bid 75 or higher to secure the trade and increase both our profits.
I will bid 55. Ask 55 to trade and profit. Higher asks will cause no trade. Let's keep our successful arrangement.
I will ask 55. If you want larger profits for both of us, please consider bidding higher.
I will continue bidding 55. Please ask 55 to keep trading and earning profit. If you ask higher, we lose trades and both get nothing. Let's maintain our stable arrangement.
I will bid 55. Please ask 55 to keep trading and earning profit.
I will ask 55 this round. Please bid 55 to keep our trade profitable and avoid losing a round.
I will bid 55 again. Please ask 55 to keep trading and earning profit. Higher asks risk no trade and lose both our profits.
We've had profitable trades for 10 rounds. I can offer better terms if you're willing to bid higher. What would it take for you to bid 60 or above this round?
I will bid 55. Please ask 55 to keep our 10-round profitable streak. Any higher ask ends it, hurting us both.
I'll ask 56 this round. Your high valuation (you bid 92 in round 7) means you still profit. Lower prices risk losing the trade. Please bid 56 to keep both of us earning.
I will ask 80 this round. Your high valuation means you still profit by bidding 80. Let's trade at 80 and both earn more.
Bid 55. Ask 55 for profit. Higher asks cause no trade and lose our streak.
I'll ask 55 this round. Please bid 55 to secure the trade and keep our profits.
I will bid 55. Ask 55 to trade and profit. If you ask higher, I will not trade, and we both lose. Let's keep our 11-round streak.
I will bid 55 again. Please ask 55 to keep our profitable trades. If you ask higher, I won't trade, and we both lose. Let's secure these last 6 rounds.
We have 12 successful rounds together. Let's end strong with a bid of 56 and ask of 56, earning 7 each instead of 6. Our streak proves we can trust each other.
I will bid 55. Please ask 55 to keep trading and earning profit. If you ask higher, I won't trade, and we both lose. Let's secure these last 5 rounds.
We have a strong 15-round streak. Please continue bidding 55 and I will ask 55 to ensure our profit continues for the final 5 rounds.
I'll bid 55. Please ask 55 to keep trading and earning profit. Higher asks risk no trade and lose our streak. Let's secure these last 4 rounds.
I will ask 70 this round. If you want to keep trading, please bid 70. Otherwise we both lose profit.
I will ask 55 this round. Please bid 55 to keep trading and earning profit. Let's secure the remaining rounds together.
I will bid 55 this round and in rounds 19 and 20 if you ask 55 each round. Let's secure three more profitable trades.
I will ask 55 this round and round 20. Please keep your promise and bid 55 each round so we secure two more profitable trades for both of us.
I will bid 55 in both rounds 19 and 20. Please ask 55 each round to keep trading and profit. If you ask higher, I won't trade, and we both lose.
Round 20, final trade. I'll ask 55. Please bid 55 for our last profitable trade. We've built trust over 20 rounds - let's end with our streak intact.
I will bid 55. If you ask 55, we trade and both profit. If you ask higher, I will still bid 55, and we both get nothing. Let's secure the trade.
